tasks.name: Hermes Update Check
tasks.description: Check if new commits are available for Hermes Agent repo (dry-run). Notify Ruben of what's new.

tasks.name: Hermes Auto Update
tasks.description: Run hermes update to pull and apply new commits. Summarize changes for Ruben.

tasks.name: Awaken Church Sermon Notes
tasks.description: Process sermon notes/messages for Awaken Church. Includes docx extraction, markdown conversion, and content organization.

tasks.name: Awaken Pixieset Pipeline
tasks.description: Extract, process, and upload content to Pixieset for Awaken Church. Handles image extraction, metadata, and uploads.

tasks.name: Awaken Receipts Tracker
tasks.description: Track and organize receipts for Awaken Church — AI services (OpenAI, Claude, xAI, Kimi, Nous Research), hosting (Vercel), and tools.

tasks.name: BlackDoctor.pro WordPress Support
tasks.description: WordPress site management for blackdoctor.pro — 800+ medical/health posts. Bulk operations, plugin dev, post re-saving, content management.

tasks.name: Supermemory Cloud Brain
tasks.description: Maintain Supermemory as Ruben's primary cloud brain (tag: rubenchis). Save important facts, search past context, sync durable knowledge.

tasks.name: Obsidian Vault Management
tasks.description: Read, write, and organize notes in the Obsidian vault. Primary local memory store with wikilinks under Rubenchis/ hierarchy.

tasks.name: Persistent Memory Maintenance
tasks.description: Keep Rubenchis memory core up to date — user preferences, environment facts, lessons learned. Prune stale entries, add new discoveries.

tasks.name: Telegram Messaging
tasks.description: Respond to Ruben's Telegram messages — questions, tasks, research, coding, life organization. Bot token configured.

tasks.name: Research & Web Intelligence
tasks.description: Web searches, article analysis, competitive research, AI news monitoring. Uses web_search, browser tools, and research skills.

tasks.name: X/Twitter Post Creator
tasks.description: Draft and manage X/Twitter posts. Custom workflow in skills/x-post-creator/.

tasks.name: WordPress Plugin Development
tasks.description: Build and maintain WordPress plugins. Prefers Codex for primary dev, mimo-v2-pro as backup model.

tasks.name: Custom Skills Management
tasks.description: Maintain and update custom skills in ~/Desktop/Hermes/skills/. Currently: x-post-creator, last30days.

tasks.name: Tasks File Maintenance
tasks.description: Keep rubenchis-macmini-tasks.json up to date. Add new tasks when created (cron jobs, client work, workflows), remove stale ones, update schedules and statuses. Review after every cron job creation, skill addition, client onboard, or workflow change.

tasks.name: Lobster Workflow Engine
tasks.description: Maintain and run Lobster workflow engine at ~/Projects/lobster/.

tasks.name: Hermes Web UI
tasks.description: Maintain the Hermes Web UI dashboard at ~/Desktop/Hermes/hermes-webui/. API backend with session management, goals, plugins, and runtime adapter.

tasks.name: AI News Digest
tasks.description: AI-focused news digest delivered to Telegram. Curated for Ruben's interests — AI news specifically, not general tech. Currently inactive (cron job needs re-setup).

tasks.name: Client Management
tasks.description: Track and manage all client work under ~/Desktop/Hermes/clients/. Maintain clients.json, onboard new clients, archive completed work.

tasks.name: File Organization
tasks.description: All project files go in ~/Desktop/Hermes/, never directly on Desktop. Enforce folder structure, clean up temp files, organize working directories.
